mapper.sql: SELECT a.asset_id, a.park_id, a.building_id, a.floor_no, a.room_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, a.asset_category, a.brand_model, a.quantity, a.unit, a.purchase_date, a.original_value, a.asset_status, a.responsible_person, a.location_note, a.remark, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, p.name AS park_name, b.name AS building_name, r.name AS room_name FROM biz_asset_record a LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = a.park_id LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = a.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_room r ON r.id = a.room_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY a.create_time DESC, a.asset_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_asset_record WHERE asset_code = #{assetCode} AND del_flag = '0' AND asset_id != #{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_asset_record SET asset_code = CONCAT(LEFT(asset_code, 70), '_deleted_', asset_id), del_flag = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE asset_id IN #{id}
